_comment: Anh xa OAS page name -> WM label. Page detector (landmark template match) robust hon dhash voi man DONG/3D. NavigateUseCase dung lam fallback khi dhash khong khop state da hoc.
_note: CHI giu mapping CHAC CHAN (nghia game trung khop). page_main da verify LIVE (score 0.989 tren HOME). Cac mapping bi loai: page_realm_raid->World (SAI: realm raid 突破 != world chat), page_friends/page_guild (CHUA verify, desc WM khong ro). Them lai sau khi verify tung cai tren live game.
